codeReview.summary: Successfully fixed TypeScript errors in all 7 files. Changes include: (1) Updated SchemaNavItem type in schema.ts to use ComponentType<LucideProps> for icon property, which indirectly fixed icon type errors in app-header.tsx, app-sidebar.tsx, nav-footer.tsx, and layouts/settings/layout.tsx; (2) Fixed navbar.tsx auth typing with usePage<SharedData>(); (3) Fixed ssr.tsx import to use default import from ziggy-js instead of non-existent vendor path; (4) Fixed Product/Show.tsx router.post to stringify product_data; (5) Added ziggy.d.ts and ziggy-vendor.d.ts type declarations for ziggy-js module.

summary: TypeScript errors fixed successfully. All 7 files resolved: 4 via direct modification (navbar.tsx, schema.ts, ssr.tsx, Product/Show.tsx) and 3 indirectly through schema.ts type change (app-header.tsx, app-sidebar.tsx, nav-footer.tsx, layouts/settings/layout.tsx). Ziggy module declarations added. npm run types passes with 0 errors.
